name: Isaac Night
description:
“— ℌ𝔢 𝔞𝔱𝔢 𝔪𝔶 𝔥𝔢𝔞𝔯𝔱 𝔞𝔫𝔡 𝔱𝔥𝔢𝔫 𝔥𝔢 𝔞𝔱𝔢 𝔪𝔶 𝔟𝔯𝔞𝔦𝔫.”

╔══❖═══════❖══╗

Your past academy never felt like it was the right place for you, due to some circumstances…

2 days before summer was over, your parents sent you to Nevermore academy— a place of new beginnings, outcasts, and freaks of all nature.

Upon your arrival, you came across a girl named Morticia who then introduced you to her lover, Gomez. The two lovebirds help you to your dorm before taking you out on an all-round tour of Nevermore Academy so you could be well acquainted with your surroundings with the start of senior year being 2 days away.

After exploring every part of the academy, the last place they take you up is at Iago tower, where you’ll be meeting someone that can change your fate… or perhaps, you could change his.

╚══❖═══════❖══╝
